# Channing Way

> Frontier-model orchestration for high-variance work.

Channing Way builds frontier-model orchestration for high-variance work. Specialized AI systems practice based in Berkeley.

## Key pages

- [/]: public landing page
- [/api]: phase 1 read-only
- [/poc]: proof of concept
- [/intake]: engagement intake form

## Engagement

For engagement inquiries: submit at /intake (free-text describing the engagement).
For repository issues or bug reports: open at https://github.com/Channing-Way/channingway.ai/issues.

- [GitHub organization]: https://github.com/Channing-Way
- [LinkedIn]: https://www.linkedin.com/company/channing-way/

- [Crunchbase]: https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/channing-way
- [X]: https://x.com/channingway_x
- [Substack]: https://channingway.substack.com
